entries.description: Frame validation returned `needs_decomposition` on reversibility-profile grounds.
entries.refutable_with: A case in which the bundle conflates reversibility-distinct interventions and Step 1 returns `valid`.

entries.description: Refuse-bundle-while-constraining-disaggregated-components first surfaced as a candidate Step 9 shape.
entries.refutable_with: A case where the bundle is genuinely non-decomposable and the procedure still produces this shape.

entries.description: Reversibility-as-decomposition-axis registered as a candidate compositional structure pending cross-case validation.
entries.refutable_with: A case in which reversibility is NOT the load-bearing axis but the procedure still imposes it.
